input.headline: Sali Hughes on beauty: from nail polish to powder, the best new makeup of 2025

raw.headline: Sali Hughes on beauty: from nail polish to powder, the best new makeup of 2025

winner: Why did the powder take a course in nail art? Because it heard Sali Hughes was teaching about the best new makeup of 2025!

candidates.text: Why did the makeup artist bring a shovel to the beauty convention in 2025? Because she heard there was going to be a powder keg of new products!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a play on 'powder keg' relating to makeup products, but the setup could be more tightly connected to Sali Hughes or the specific context of the headline."}

candidates.text: Why was the makeup artist's wallet always full? Because it was always packed with the latest powders and polishes from 2025!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks surprise and depth. It's a mild pun on 'packed with powders and polishes' but feels generic and not particularly funny or specific."}

candidates.text: Why did the powder take a course in nail art? Because it heard Sali Hughes was teaching about the best new makeup of 2025!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific to the headline but relies on a forced pun that may not land well. It's brief and has some surprise, but the humor feels a bit strained and lacks natural flow."}

candidates.text: Why did the makeup artist go bankrupt in 2025? Because her "best new makeup of 2025" was all outdated by 2026!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant to the headline but lacks originality and surprise; it's predictable and relies on a common time-based punchline."}

candidates.text: Why did the cosmetic industry finally create self-applying foundation in 2025? Because Sali Hughes was tired of doing her own nails.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "Lacks specificity and the punchline is weak and unrelated to the headline's focus on makeup innovation."}
